wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Infused Core|2|Name=}} {{Keyword Infobox|Lightning|2}}
{{R|Infused Core|3=2}} is the Starter Upgrade of the {{KW|Defect||2}}'s {{R|Cracked Core|3=2}}. It {{KW|Channel|Channels|2}} 3 {{KW|Lightning||2}} at the start of combat instead of 1.

== Sources ==
Can be obtained by taking the {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}} from {{KW|Orobas||2}}. Replaces {{R|Cracked Core|3=2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions ==
Can only be obtained by {{KW|Defect||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
* {{R|Symbiotic Virus||2}} will {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Dark||2}} after the 3 {{KW|Lightning||2}} is {{KW|Channel|Channeled|2}}.
=== Synergies ===
* Cards and Relics that provide {{BD|Focus||2}}, such as {{R|Data Disk||2}}, {{C|Hotfix||2}}, and {{C|Defragment||2}}, will increase the damage of the {{KW|Lightning||2}} channeled by {{R|Infused Core||2}}.
* {{R|Gold-Plated Cables||2}}, {{C|Tesla Coil||2}}, and {{C|Loop||2}} will allow the {{KW|Lightning|Lightning's|2}} passive to trigger multiple times in a turn.
* {{R|Metronome||2}} will get 3 stacks from {{R|Infused Core||2}} {{KW|Channel|Channeling|2}} 3 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Voltaic||2}} will be able to {{KW|Channel||2}} 3 additional {{KW|Lightning||2}}
* {{C|Dualcast||2}}, {{C|Quadcast||2}}, and {{C|Multi-Cast||2}} can be used to {{KW|Evoke|Evoke|2}} the {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Thunder||2}} will deal additional damage to each enemy hit when the {{KW|Lightning||2}} is {{KW|Evoke|Evoked|2}}.
* {{C|Coolant||2}}, {{C|Compile Driver||2}}, and {{C|Synchronize||2}} will increase their effectiveness for each Orb type {{KW|Channel|Channeled|2}}.
=== Anti-Synergies ===
* {{C|Hyperbeam||2}} will reduce the damage dealt by the {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.105.0 (BETA)'''
**Buffed Infused Core: Now also gains "Lighting Orbs deal 1 additional damage."
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Infused Core to the game.
